seeds.label: Battery office delivery
seeds.description: Two AA batteries with full modeled courier time.
seeds.missionText: I need two AA batteries delivered to my East Village office. Show the courier's true gross hourly rate.

seeds.label: Phone charger delivery
seeds.description: One charger with waiting and return time included.
seeds.missionText: Deliver one phone charger to the East Village office and include all working time.

seeds.label: Greenpoint battery job
seeds.description: Two batteries delivered through the cooperative network.
seeds.missionText: Bring two AA batteries to the Greenpoint apartment and calculate the courier's gross rate.

seeds.label: Umbrella delivery
seeds.description: One umbrella with the complete trip counted.
seeds.missionText: Deliver one umbrella to the East Village office and count the full trip.
